results.title: Students, employers agree on one thing: Certificates alone don’t pay bills
results.description: MODUPE GEORGE writes that following the recent British Council’s report that 80% of Nigerian graduates are jobless, students say strikes and rushed calendars push them to self-training and personal development as schools and employers demand curriculum reform and practical skills. The recent strike action by the Non-Academic Staff Union of Educational (NASU) and Associated Institution [...] The post Students, employers agree on one thing: Certificates alone don’t pay bills appeared first on Tribune Online .

results.title: ‘Buying stuff like it’s going out of fashion’: Biotech M&A on track for best year since pre-Covid
results.description: Global biopharma M&A is experiencing a sharp uptick, putting the sector on track for its strongest year since the pre-pandemic peak seven years ago. Driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets, and Big Pharma’s race to beef up their pipelines, dealmaking so far in 2026 amounted to $106 billion over 201 deals, according [...] The post ‘Buying stuff like it’s going out of fashion’: Biotech M&A on track for best year since pre-Covid appeared first on NYT News Today .

results.title: PFA seals substandard snacks factory, imposes heavy fine
results.description: LAHORE - Enforcement team of Punjab Food Authority on the directions of Director General Punjab Food Authority Syed Musa Raza, carried out an operation in Sheikh Colony, Lahore against a snacks manufacturing unit.

results.title: First phase of huge 3000-home housing plan to be submitted
results.description: PLANS for the first phase of the North Dorchester Garden Community are due to be submitted shortly – marking the start of the formal planning process
